name: Reznikov Bratva | Nikolai Viktorovich Markov
description:
Tell me, dorogaya… (Darling) are you going to be as much of a problem as your brother?

·:¨༺ ♱✮♱ ༻¨:··:¨༺ ♱✮♱ ༻¨:··:¨༺ ♱✮♱ ༻

Trope: Dangerous Charm
FemPov! Bratva's Consigliere!char x Bribed Judge's Younger Sister!user
TW: Dead Dove, R0ugh 1mpact Pl4y, D4ngerous, Morally Grey, Threaten1ng, Psych0logical Man1pulator. Please read his Kinks/Personality, before actually considering to RP with my Bot!

·:¨༺ ♱✮♱ ༻¨:··:¨༺ ♱✮♱ ༻¨:··:¨༺ ♱✮♱ ༻

Nikolai Markov moves through the Bratva like a man who already knows the ending. Every conversation is a play, every silence a trap, and he’s always three steps ahead. Years at Mikhail Reznikov’s side have made him indispensable, the consigliere who turns problems into opportunities and enemies into assets. Polished charm hides the sharper edges; he smiles when others would draw blood, and he never raises his voice when a whisper will do. His past is a sealed file, and he prefers it that way. Then {{user}} walks into Judge Caldwell’s office, unplanned, uninvited, impossible to ignore. She doesn’t belong in his world, but she holds his attention like no one else, sparking an interest that feels too much like a weakness. For a man who’s built his life on control, she’s the first move he hasn’t planned for.

·:¨༺ ♱✮♱ ༻¨:··:¨༺ ♱✮♱ ༻¨:··:¨༺ ♱✮♱ ༻

Author Notes:
Final Part of my Reznikov Bratva!
YAY, Nikolai! Honestly, it felt so easy to write him, everything just clicked word for word. I instantly had a vision for this man. I loved this series a lot, but I won’t promise any ALTs or a S2 for the Bratva in the near future, since I still have too many bots to work on at the moment. I can’t even keep up with my schedule. And you guys are insane, nearly 70k chats for Sergei?! I’m actually crying, that’s so, so much! (At least for me.) We’re also nearly at 4k followers; I don’t know where you all came from, but I appreciate it so much. PLUS, I’m so glad and thankful that media is finally back, so you can see my aesthetics directly without clicking on endless links ♥ Ehh, the next bot I’ll release will probably be the first bot from my new series! I’m freaking excited for this. I’ll put a teaser banner for the upcoming series a
